A

apply(Project) - Method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMPlugin
 

D

DEFAULT_CANVAS_ID - Static variable in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Default HTML canvas element ID expected by FlixelTeaVMLauncher.
DEFAULT_TITLE - Static variable in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Default title for the game's browser tab.

F

FlixelTeaVMExtension - Interface in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm
Configuration extension exposed as the flixelgdx DSL block in a web module's build.gradle.
FlixelTeaVMPlugin - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm
Gradle plugin that automates the web assembly steps required to run a FlixelGDX game via TeaVM in a browser.
FlixelTeaVMPlugin() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMPlugin
 

G

getAssetsDir() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Directory whose contents are copied to <outputDir>/assets/ before each build.
getCanvasId() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
ID of the HTML <canvas> element that the game renders into.
getCustomFavicon() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Optional path to a favicon file (any format supported by browsers, e.g.
getCustomIndexHtml() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Optional path to a custom index.html file.
getCustomStartupLogo() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Optional path to a custom startup-logo.png file.
getDevServerPort() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
TCP port that the run task's embedded HTTP dev server listens on.
getGenerateDefaultIndexHtml() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Whether the plugin should generate a default index.html when none is found in FlixelTeaVMExtension.getWebappDir().
getGenerateDefaultStartupLogo() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Whether the plugin should automatically add a default default-startup-logo.png file when none is found in FlixelTeaVMExtension.getWebappDir().
getOutputDir() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Directory into which the assembled web application is written.
getTitle() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
The title that is set on the browser tab the game is running in.
getWebappDir() - Method in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Directory that contains user-provided web resources such as a custom index.html, favicon, or additional scripts.

M

me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm - package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm
 

N

NAME - Static variable in interface me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.gradle.teavm.FlixelTeaVMExtension
Gradle extension name used to register this extension under.
